answer:
\boxed{C}

The **Isuzu Trooper** has been rebadged the most, appearing as the **Chevy Blazer**, **GMC Jimmy**, **Holden Commodore Ute**, **Toyota Land Cruiser (J70)**, and even the **Mitsubishi Pajero** in some markets. This model was a global platform shared across multiple brands, making it one of the most widely rebadged SUVs. The other options have fewer rebadging instances.
